properties.name: easy-extension.allow-unknown-business
properties.description: 是否允许未知业务，当没有业务身份可以匹配时，如果不允许未知业务则请求报错，如果允许，则扩展点会走默认能力兜底 whether to allow unknown business. when there is no business to match, if not allowed, the request will report an error. If allowed, the extension point will use the default ability.

properties.name: easy-extension.enable-log
properties.description: 是否启用日志，扩展点匹配过程会打印相应的日志 whether to enable logs, the extension point matching process will print log

properties.name: easy-extension.enable-session-auto-cleanup
properties.description: 是否启用Session自动清理过滤器 whether to enable the session auto cleanup filter, which automatically cleans up session data in ThreadLocal after the web request ends to prevent memory leaks

properties.name: easy-extension.business-match-order
properties.description: 业务匹配优先级顺序（使用业务 code）。当多个业务同时匹配时，按此顺序选择优先级最高的。未列出的按注册顺序排在末尾。
